# CWE-1265 negative: lock scope avoids nested acquisition (pure stdlib)
lang: go
file: CWE-1265-safe.pure.go
variant: pure-go
---
package sample

// CWE-1265 mitigated: helper performs SQL update; handler holds lock only once per path.

import (
	"database/sql"
	"net/http"
	"sync"
)

var ledgerMuSafePure sync.Mutex

func applyBalanceDeltaPure(db *sql.DB, userID int, delta float64) error {
	_, err := db.Exec(
		"UPDATE balances SET amount = amount + $1 WHERE user_id = $2", delta, userID,
	)
	return err
}

func PostTransferSafePure(db *sql.DB) http.HandlerFunc {
	return func(w http.ResponseWriter, r *http.Request) {
		fromID, toID := 1, 2
		amount := 10.0
		ledgerMuSafePure.Lock()
		defer ledgerMuSafePure.Unlock()
		if err := applyBalanceDeltaPure(db, fromID, -amount); err != nil {
			http.Error(w, err.Error(), http.StatusInternalServerError)
			return
		}
		if err := applyBalanceDeltaPure(db, toID, amount); err != nil {
			http.Error(w, err.Error(), http.StatusInternalServerError)
			return
		}
		w.WriteHeader(http.StatusOK)
	}
}
